notes: Live-fetch enrichment continuation for top candidates 21-30.

results.exclusion_reason: $200K rev / 3 employees per BuildZoom — sub-SBA scale (<$300K rev). Marvin Reavis P.E. (TAMU CE 1970) — primarily an engineer, RPLS ancillary. Firm est 1991 — 35yr operating, but small. Owner-operator consulting practice, not a target.
results.team_page_evidence: BuildZoom + Manta + Yellow Pages confirm address 2003 N Mays St Suite 105, Round Rock 78664; 3 employees / $200K rev. Marvin Reavis is owner. TAMU Civil Eng 1970 grad → likely 78yo today. Engineering-primary firm.
coasting_tells: Sub-scale ($200K rev / 3 employees) — below SBA acquisition threshold.

results.exclusion_reason: Centro Resources LLC: $4M revenue, 23 employees, established 2010, energy-industry-specialist with MODERN tech-stack (laser scanning, drone surveys, GIS mapping). Larry Turman brought his RPLS to this newer venture. Firm tenure 16yr (not 54yr from RPLS proxy). Already at platform-acquirer-bid scale; tech-forward = opposite of coasting.
results.demote_reason: Modern tech-forward $4M rev firm with laser scanning + drone — already at strategic-acquirer scale, not an off-market coasting profile.
results.team_page_evidence: centroresources.com (search summary): 'Established in 2010', $4M revenue, 23 employees, energy-industry-specialist; uses advanced surveying technologies, laser scanning, GIS mapping; services include Boundary Surveys + Platting, Pipeline/Powerline Easements, Well Site/Facility Surveys, Abstracting, As-Builts, GIS, Laser Scanning, Drone Surveys. Larry Turman has 45yr RPLS experience but founded Centro recently.

Hart Jr. is VP of Engineering and Surveying — the 'Jr.' indicates he's the son of the senior RPLS Jeryl D Hart (RPLS granted 1975). Firm has multi-discipline staff. DEMOTE A→B: explicit Jr. successor in place.
results.team_page_evidence: r2meng.com (search summary): multi-disciplined firm (civil + environmental + safety); 100+yr combined experience; Jeryl 'Jere' D. Hart Jr. is VP Engineering + Surveying, mentors staff, lead surveyor for PS&E projects, 47+yr experience. The 'Jr.' on the firm is the active operator. Lubbock TX, $unknown rev but multi-disciplined firm.
results.demote_reason: Family successor (Hart Jr.) is active VP and lead surveyor — internal-succession candidate.

results.legal_name: BLUE SKY SURVEYING AND MAPPING CORPORATION
results.successor_evidence: blueskysurveying.com homepage (live-fetch attempt — ECONNREFUSED on direct fetch; relying on search-result summaries). David Petree (RPLS #1890, since 1975, 50yr career). 'Davana Petree' also listed at the firm per ZoomInfo (potential family-surname successor — wife or daughter; role unclear). Specialty: retail, shopping center, development services. Multi-state SOS records (11015 Midway Rd, Dallas 75229).
results.team_page_evidence: blueskysurveying.com (search-result summary): David is RPLS+TBPLS Reg #10105700; RPLS #1890; 'nearly 50yr career'; Geomatic professionals specialized in retail/shopping/development; Davana Petree at the firm per ZoomInfo.
results.demote_reason: Davana Petree's role unclear from search results — if she's a credentialed RPLS or co-principal it's an internal-succession candidate; if admin only it's not. Cap at B until live-fetch can resolve. Surname match alone is enough to demote per skill rule.
coasting_tells: Solo RPLS David Petree for 50+ years (RPLS #1890 granted 1976) — but Davana Petree presence suggests family operation.
Specialty niche (retail/shopping/development) — recurring-B2B but capacity-bound by single RPLS.
Owner age est ~80 (RPLS 1976 + 30 + 16 = ~80) — natural exit window.

Solo RPLS Glenn Galbraith for 49+ years (RPLS granted 1977) — no second RPLS at firm per TBPELS join.

results.successor_evidence: Firm legal name literally contains '& SON' = explicit successor in firm name. OpenCorporates / CorporationWiki show C. E. McAdams + H. E. McAdams as directors. Two-generation family operation: Harold E. McAdams (RPLS #2005) is senior; C.E. McAdams is son (director). DEMOTE A→B.
results.team_page_evidence: OpenCorporates TX SOS file 0800019643; BestCompanyTexas listing; OpenGov listing at 1025 12th St Huntsville TX 77340; two officers: C.E. McAdams + H.E. McAdams (both directors). Firm incorporated 2001-10-15.
results.demote_reason: Legal name '& Son' + two same-surname directors = explicit family-successor team. Per skill rule, internal-buy-in candidate, not coasting-solo-to-outside.

results.successor_evidence: Live-fetch of floresengineers.com/about-us/ (2026-05-16): Only Thomas Flores named as founder/principal. 'Mr. Flores acquired sole ownership' after partner departure. No successor / son / daughter / Jr listed anywhere on page. Multi-discipline (civil engineering + land surveying). Founded 1982, 43yr in business. Born in Beeville TX 1945, raised in San Antonio, Army Captain (Corp of Engineers), UT Arlington BSCE. No tech mentioned (drone/RTK/scanning). Service area 150mi radius from SA, up to 16,000-acre projects.
results.team_page_evidence: floresengineers.com/about-us/ live-fetch: Thomas Flores born Beeville TX 1945 (age 81 in 2026); UT Arlington BSCE; Army Corps of Engineers Captain; founded firm 1982; 'sole ownership'; no successor named. Multi-service: topographic, grading, utility planning, stormwater. Service area 150mi from SA, up to 16,000-acre projects. SBA Hub/Minority potential (Flores surname, founder of color).
coasting_tells: Solo principal Thomas Flores P.E.+RPLS — sole owner per firm About page.
Born 1945 (verified via website bio) → age 81 in 2026 — well past natural exit window.
No technology mentioned (drone/RTK/scanning absent) — classic surveying low-tech posture.
No successor / Jr. / family member listed on team page.
Multi-discipline (engineering + surveying) but engineering-primary; surveying-acquisition thesis may not be primary fit.

results.successor_evidence: Multi-generation family: Trey Fuller is General Manager (likely Jr.). Wm S. Abraham is the RPLS attached to firm (TBPELS RPLS granted 1979). Firm est 2004 — only 22yr (NOT 47yr from RPLS tenure proxy); the RPLS is older than the firm = Abraham brought license. Trey Fuller running operations + Abraham as RPLS-of-record = effectively succession in place.
results.team_page_evidence: dfwsurvey.com (search summary): 'Fastest growing land surveying firm in DFW'; service area 11 N TX counties; Trey Fuller is GM; established 2004 (engineering) + 2015 (added land surveying); Wm S Abraham is RPLS-of-record per TBPELS.
results.demote_reason: Firm tenure 22yr (not 47yr from RPLS proxy); Trey Fuller GM + Wm S Abraham RPLS-of-record = effective succession in place. Multi-generation family operating, modernized (fastest growing).
